<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardperd (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-ngū]][[de:Erde-Pferd]][[hak:Vú-ńg]][[ja:戊午]][[ko:무오]][[vi:Mậu Ngọ]][[za:Fouhngux]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-ngó͘]][[zh-yue:戊午]][[zh:戊午]]

'''Yang Earth Horse also known as 戊午''' (tsuchinoeuma, bodonouma, bogo) is one of the elements of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 55th combination of the [[Sexagenary cycle]], preceded by [[Yin Fire Snake]] and followed by [[Yin Earth Goat]]. In the framework of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin Yang Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems]] symbol [[Tsuchinoe (戊)]] represents yang [[Earth (wuxing)|Earth (土)]], while the [[Earthly Branches]] symbol [[Horse (zodiac)|Horse (午)]] represents yang [[Fire (wuxing)|Fire (火)]], establishing a generating relationship ([[Mutual Generation]], i.e. Fire generates Earth).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Horse (戊午)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùwǔ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 ng5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-uma
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-uma
***Onyomi 1: bogo
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muo (무오)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Ngọ

==Years of Yang Earth Horse==
A year in the [[Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 58 when divided by 60 is a year of Bokugo ([[Year|year]]).
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Years of Bokugo (戊午の年)'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 58|58 AD]]
* [[AD 118|118 AD]]
* [[178|178 AD]]
* [[238|238 AD]]
* [[298|298 AD]]
* [[358|358 AD]]
* [[418|418 AD]]
* [[478|478 AD]]
* [[538|538 AD]]
* [[598|598 AD]]
* [[658|658 AD]]
* [[718|718 AD]]
* [[778|778 AD]]
* [[838|838 AD]]
* [[898|898 AD]]
* [[958|958 AD]]
|
* [[1018|1018 AD]]
* [[1078|1078 AD]]
* [[1138|1138 AD]]
* [[1198|1198 AD]]
* [[1258|1258 AD]]
* [[1318|1318 AD]]
* [[1378|1378 AD]]
* [[1438|1438 AD]]
* [[1498|1498 AD]]
* [[1558|1558 AD]]
* [[1618|1618 AD]]
* [[1678|1678 AD]]
* [[1738|1738 AD]]
* [[1798|1798 AD]]
* [[1858|1858 AD]]
* [[1918|1918 AD]]
* [[1978|1978 AD]]
|
* [[2038 AD]]
* [[2090s|2098 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2158 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2218 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2278 AD]]
* [[2338 AD]]
* [[2398 AD]]
* [[2458 AD]]
* [[2518 AD]]
* [[2578 AD]]
* [[2638 AD]]
* [[2698 AD]]
* [[2758 AD]]
* [[2818 AD]]
* [[2878 AD]]
* [[2938 AD]]
* [[2998 AD]]
|}

==Months of Yang Earth Horse==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the [[Heavenly Stems]] are [[Mizunoto (癸)]] or [[Tsuchinoe (戊)]]), the month of [[May]] is designated as the Bokugo [[Month]]. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to the seasonal month (from [[Mangzhong]] until the day before [[Xiaoshu|Slightly Hot]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Earth Horse==
The [[Senjitsu]] for Bokugo is as follows.
=== Selected Day (選日) ===
Bokugo day is the gap day of [[Hassen]].
==See Also==
<!--Yang Earth Horse--><!--Yang Earth Horse-->

{{wikidata link|Q905011}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
